log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Bugbear — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Bugbear — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Bugbear — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Bugbear — Bardic Musician HP: 55/67
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Bugbear — Bardic Musician HP: 39/67
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Bugbear — Bardic Musician HP: 24/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Bugbear — Bardic Musician --- HP: 24/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Bugbear — Bardic Musician --- HP: 24/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Bugbear — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Bugbear — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Bugbear — Bardic Musician HP: 2/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 11] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Bugbear — Bardic Musician HP: -18/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Bugbear — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Bugbear — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Bugbear — Bardic Musician HP: 50/67
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 26 damage. Bugbear — Bardic Musician HP: 24/67
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Bugbear — Bardic Musician HP: 1/67
--- Bugbear — Bardic Musician --- HP: 1/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (1/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Bugbear — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Bugbear — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Bugbear — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Bugbear — Bardic Musician HP: -11/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Bugbear — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
